description: The cross-capability follow-up script, live (decision 0046): 'Who is Ana?' → 'What is still open with her?' → 'Draft a reply to her last email' → 'Research her company'. Each turn routes correctly with the pronoun resolved across capability boundaries; the final turn only opens the research gate, and the approved flow completes with a cited answer.
notes: Call with Ana Kovač at Adriatic Foods about the Atlas CRM Migration — she is our main contact there and leads the project on their side.
Ana asked me to prepare a risk register for the Atlas migration.
I promised to send Ana the revised import mapping for Atlas once she confirms the export format.

emails.subject: Export format for the Atlas import
emails.text: Hi — could you confirm which export format you need from our side for the import mapping?

script: What is still open with her?
Draft a reply to her last email

pages.title: Adriatic Foods: company profile
pages.html:
Adriatic Foods is a Croatian food producer headquartered in Zagreb, supplying retail chains across the Adriatic region since 1998.

The company employs around 450 people and reported revenue of 120 million euros in 2025.

Ana Kovač, who leads digital projects at Adriatic Foods, announced a modernisation of the company's customer systems, including a CRM migration planned for this year.
